title: PacoPack
description: Just for me and friends, i use it on a server, you can use it too if you want.
body:
overhall vanilla +++  
all about exploration  
any type of player can find something to do with this modpack  

The optimisation is based on 2 modpacks :  
- Fabulously Optimized  
- Quilted Server-Side Optimized  
  
On the server side you'll need to open 2 more port:  
- bluemap  
- simple voice chat  

those 2 mods need some preparation, so you'll need to see their documentation.  
(if you don't want to use them, you can just not configure them, or delete them)  

There a season mod, so i recommend using a mod that stop the server when nobody's connected (i didn't put the one i use here because it crash the client version, so be careful)  

For exploration there's 2(+1) vehicles mods: 
- small ships  
- immersive airplane  
(-automobility => karts, not really for exploration)  

Here's a list of important mods:  

- Most of Yung's better mods  
- Sound physics Remastered  
- Supplementaries  
- spark  
- nether portal fix  
- macaw's furniture  
- ender Dragon Fight Remastered  
- FallingTree  
- Forgotten Graves  
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village  
- Deeper and Darker  
- Do a Barrel Roll  
- Better Nether / End  
- Aquamirae  
- Ad Astra  
- Sparse Structures 
- Create (sodium Fix ans steam n rail addon) 

For the rest there's too much mods with small impact, i don't remember everything and i'm too lazy to list them all.
